===Pokémon competitions===
Sophocles has competed in the following {{cat|Pokémon competitions}}:
* [[Pokémon Pancake Race]] - Disqualified (''[[SM013|Racing to a Big Event!]]'')
* [[Charjabug race|Charjabug race Koko Cup]] - Winner (with {{Ash}} and {{an|Kiawe}}; ''[[SM041|Mounting an Electrifying Charge!]]'')
* [[Alola TV|Alola Pokémon Quiz]] - Preliminary round (''[[SM113|This Magik Moment!]]'')
* [[Kantonian Gym]] - Second floor (''[[SM118|Aiming for the Top Floor!]]'')
* [[Vikavolt race|Vikavolt race Fini Cup]] - Winner (''[[SM119|A High-Speed Awakening!]]'')
